MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JEROME BERG Motion For New Trial Or In The Alternative For Reconsideration Of Order August 20,2002 Pursuant To CCP 1008:
APPEAR: Jerome Berg, 775-7751 pltf & moving party in pro per; Courtney M. Coates, Esq. 995-5026 for defts & opposing parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court denied the motion for reconsideration. Defts request to increase amount of security denied. Order signed in open court (15 days to post security). (302/AJR/RS) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193

MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Jerome Berg, 775-7751 pltf & opposing party in pro per; Courtney M. Coates, Esq. & Jacquelyn J. Garman, Esq. 777-3200 for defts & moving parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (MOTION FOR ORDER DECLARING PLAINTIFF JEROME BERG A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT, REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO FURNISH SECURITY, AND IMPOSING PRE-FILING ORDER RE NEW LITIGATION UNDER CCP SECTION 391 ET SEQ. IS GRANTED. HEARING REQUIRED TO DETERMINE AMOUNT OF SECURITY). Court sets amount of security at $15,000.00. Order signed in open court. (AJR/JH)
